sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP(6) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:00:00+00');
UPDATE events SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 12:00:00+02' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM events;
DELETE FROM events WHERE event_time < TIMESTAMP '2023-09-30 00:00:00+00';
